title: Aureline first-run, entry, restore, and migration-result object model
description: Seed schema for the cross-surface object model every first-run, Start Center, project-entry, template / prebuild, workspace-switch, session-restore, crash-recovery, and migration-handoff surface reads. Freezes one project_entry_action_record (entry verbs Open / Clone / Import / Add root / Restore / Resume / StartFromSnapshot), one recent_work_entry_record, one restore_prompt_record, and one migration_result_record. The migration-result taxonomy covers exact / translated / approximated / skipped / blocked / needs_review / rollback_available outcomes and reserves typed slots for category-specific parity scores, equivalence-map rows, post-import validation outcome references, and next-step decision hooks (roll_back_import, keep_imported_state, adopt_recommended_bundle, review_unsupported_items). Vocabulary is re-used unchanged from ADR-0001 (trust state), ADR-0003 (checkpoint / recovery-journal), ADR-0006 (filesystem identity), and ADR-0010 (connected-provider / browser-handoff tickets). Rust types in the eventual workspace-entry / migration-center crates are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool export. Adding a new entry_verb, target_kind, resulting_mode, restore_level, missing_target_state, checkpoint_linked_recovery_class, migration outcome, skip_reason, block_reason, post_import_validator_class, or next_step_decision_hook is additive-minor and bumps entry_and_restore_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

entry_and_restore_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this entry / restore / migration-result vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests, support bundles, and claim manifests. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw remote URLs, and raw competitor-config bodies never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: Producer-local monotonic timestamp. Opaque to this schema; the exporter does not require any specific clock source.

redaction_aware_text.description: Redaction-aware free text (<= 1024 graphemes). The exporter is responsible for applying the redaction policy before the value crosses the boundary.

entry_verb.description: Frozen entry-verb set. Surfaces MUST render these verbs distinctly; collapsing any two into a generic get-started label is non-conforming. See entry_restore_object_model.md §1.1.

target_kind.description: What is being acquired or opened. A surface that cannot resolve target_kind denies with target_kind_unresolved rather than silently classify. See §1.2.

resulting_mode.description: What Aureline will actually materialize on commit of the entry action. See §1.3.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 identity-mode trust vocabulary. Re-exported unchanged; never redefined.

admission_class.description: How the entry admission resolved. Every non-admitted value routes to at least one typed next_step_decision_hook.

source_surface.description: Which entry surface originated the action. Preserves intent across migration between surfaces so recents / palette / Start Center stay consistent.

destination_disposition.description: What bytes the entry may write, and where. A surface that silently promotes write_to_labelled_staging to write_to_durable_workspace is non-conforming.

collision_class.description: Destination collision class. Every non-no_collision value MUST appear in a destination-collision sheet before commit.

credential_handle_ref.description: Opaque handle into ADR-0007 credential-store. Raw secrets never cross this boundary.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Optional ADR-0010 connected-provider / browser-handoff approval-ticket reference.

remote_target_descriptor.description: Typed descriptor for a remote target. Never carries raw credentials or raw URLs with embedded credentials.

machine_local_exclusions.description: Typed list of machine-local exclusion classes already scrubbed (live auth tokens removed, machine-unique trust anchors dropped, etc.). The list is semantic, not raw.

artifact_descriptor.description: Typed artifact descriptor for a transferred / portable / template / handoff target. Raw bytes never appear; the import flow references the descriptor by id.

deep_link_descriptor.description: Typed descriptor for review / work-item / notification / auth-callback deep links. Deep links never elevate trust.

filesystem_identity_ref.description: Opaque reference to a filesystem_identity_record (see schemas/filesystem/save_target_token.schema.json#/$defs/filesystem_identity_record). Required when target_kind is a local kind; the referenced record carries the ADR-0006 four-layer identity.

side_effect_envelope.description: Required on entry actions whose resulting_mode exposes setup actions. Never collapses into 'prepare environment' when concrete actions are known.

next_step_decision_hook.description: Closed set of typed decision hooks the shell may offer after an entry / restore / migration action. Free-form action labels are non-conforming.

restore_prompt_ref.description: Optional reference to a companion restore_prompt_record; required when entry_verb is restore or resume.

migration_result_ref.description: Optional reference to a companion migration_result_record; required when entry_verb is import and the import wrote items.

recent_work_entry_ref.description: Optional reference to the recent_work_entry_record the action resolved from when source_surface is recent_work_activation, workspace_switcher, or start_center.

project_entry_action_record.description: One project-entry action. Emitted on every user intent to enter, acquire, or rehydrate work across Start Center, command palette, OS file association, drag-and-drop, deep link, CLI, headless, and template / prebuild surfaces.

recent_work_target_state.description: Closed state set a recent-work row renders in its state chip.

portability_class.description: Closed portability-class set; Start Center chips read this verbatim.

restore_availability.description: How much of a prior session a recent-work row can restore. A row that promises a higher level than the companion restore_prompt_record is non-conforming.

safe_recovery_action.description: Closed safe-recovery action set. Free-form action labels on recent-work rows are non-conforming.

parity_score_ref.description: One category-specific parity score row. Aggregate-only scores that hide weak categories are non-conforming.

equivalence_map_row_ref.description: One equivalence-map row. name_heuristic is allowed only when no stronger basis exists and the row is flagged for review.

parity_score_refs.description: Reserved slot for per-category parity scores when the recent entry arrived through a migration import.

equivalence_map_row_refs.description: Reserved slot for per-item equivalence-map rows from the source migration.

post_import_validation_refs.description: Reserved slot for post-import validation outcome refs.

bundle_adoption_ref.description: Optional reference to an adopted workflow bundle.

recent_work_entry_record.description: One recent-work row. Read by Start Center, workspace switcher, palette-recents, OS jump lists, and CLI-recents surfaces.

restore_level.description: UI/UX spec §6.10 controlled terms. Diagnostics, crash screens, support bundles, and docs reuse these verbatim.

missing_target_state.description: Closed missing-target state set. fully_present is the only value that may appear alone.

session_execution_posture.description: Closed session-scoped execution posture set for terminals, tasks, debug sessions, notebook kernels, preview servers, and remote tunnels.

checkpoint_linked_recovery_class.description: Closed recovery-class set. Orthogonal to restore_level. The class determines the user-visible verb: Undo only for exact_rollback_from_checkpoint; Revert with compensation for compensating_rollback; Regenerate for regenerate_from_canonical_source; Restore for the checkpoint/journal/snapshot/backup classes; Manual recovery for manual_recovery_required.

session_execution_postures.description: Per-surface execution posture entries. live_session_continued is reachable only when the runtime actually survived.

dirty_buffer_summary.description: Required when restore_level = recovered_drafts. Drives the 'compare / discard / open journal' action set.

checkpoint_ref.description: Required for every non-manual_recovery_required recovery class.

verb_label_class.description: The user-visible verb class resolved from recovery_class. Surfaces render the controlled label verbatim.

restore_provenance_ref.description: Optional reference to a restore-provenance record (source, producer build, schema version, redaction class, resulting fidelity).

restore_prompt_record.description: One restore prompt. Read by session-restore, crash-recovery, topology-adjust, and continuity surfaces.

migration_item_outcome.description: Closed per-item migration outcome set. rollback_available is an orthogonal companion axis: an item may additionally carry rollback_available when a pre-apply checkpoint is retained.

migration_skip_reason.description: Closed skip-reason set. Required on every skipped item.

migration_block_reason.description: Closed block-reason set. Required on every blocked item.

migration_review_hook.description: Closed review-hook set. Required on every needs_review item.

outcomes.description: One item MAY carry at most one primary outcome from {exact, translated, approximated, skipped, blocked, needs_review} plus optionally rollback_available as a companion axis.

migration_item_record.description: One imported item's outcome row. skip_reason is required when outcomes contains skipped; block_reason when it contains blocked; review_hook when it contains needs_review; rollback_checkpoint_ref when it contains rollback_available.

entry_action_ref.description: Reference to the project_entry_action_record that produced this migration result.

source_class.description: Import source class. Controls the default supported-import scope per UI/UX spec §21.19.

parity_score_refs.description: Per-category parity scores. Category-specific parity is mandatory; a single aggregate score is non-conforming.

migration_checkpoint_ref.description: Migration-level rollback checkpoint ref; required when any item carries rollback_available at migration scope.

bundle_recommendation_ref.description: Optional reference to a recommended workflow bundle; drives adopt_recommended_bundle.

next_step_decision_hooks.description: At minimum, the four migration-handoff hooks — roll_back_import, keep_imported_state, adopt_recommended_bundle, review_unsupported_items — are reserved on every migration result that admits them.

migration_result_record.description: One migration-import result. Read by the migration center, post-import validation card, support bundle, and every 'Adopt recommended bundle' / 'Roll back import' surface.
